name: sm-accelerator
description: Shared Salesforce DX accelerator project structure for team-based development.

scripts.test:apex: sf apex run test --test-level RunLocalTests --code-coverage --result-format human
scripts.validate: sf project deploy validate --source-dir force-app --test-level RunLocalTests
scripts.deploy: sf project deploy start --source-dir force-app --test-level RunLocalTests
